abhor: verb. To regard (someone or something) as horrifying or detestable; to feel great repugnance toward.
abo: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Abon.
above: preposition. Physically over; on top of; worn on top of, said of clothing.

bare: adjective. Minimal; that is or are just sufficient.

behavior: noun. Human conduct relative to social norms.

bore: verb. To inspire boredom in somebody.
